a.xlink:title: Aggregate module for helios::engine::mechanics::bounds namespace.
Aggregate module for helios::engine::mechanics::bounds::systems namespace.
Aggregate module for helios::engine::mechanics::bounds::components namespace.
System for handling entity behavior at level boundaries.
Tag type for identifying System-role classes at compile time.
Tag component indicating an active entity.
Per-frame context passed to systems during game loop updates.
Lightweight view for iterating entities with specific components.
High-level facade for entity manipulation in the ECS.
Scene graph node representing a transform and optional renderable.
Command for requesting GameObject despawning and pool return.
Component for linking GameObjects to the scene graph.
Component for storing the canonical AABB of a model.
Component for managing composite rotation state from heading and spin.
Module exports for mathematical types and utilities.
Component that tracks which spawn profile created a GameObject.
Component for Axis-Aligned Bounding Box (AABB) collision detection.
Component defining behavior when an entity interacts with level boundaries.
Enum for defining collision response behaviors.
Enumeration of collision response behaviors.
Concrete command buffer pre-configured with all engine command types.
Compile-time bindings mapping state types to their transition ID types.
Component for 2D physics-based movement .
Component for managing entity heading and rotation physics.
Component for managing local and world transformations of a GameObject.
Central game state container for entities, resources, and the active level.
Component for storing the current translation (position) state of an entity.
Component for storing a normalized direction vector.
Versioned handle for referencing entities in an EntityPool.
Lightweight callable for resolving EntityHandles to GameObjects.
Type-indexed registry for engine resources with O(1) lookup.
Type-safe event bus for inter-system communication within the game loop.
Defines the Level class representing a game level or stage.
Immutable snapshot of viewport state for frame-consistent rendering.
Immutable snapshot of input state at a specific point in time.
Type alias for entity identifiers within an EntityPool.
Central manager for entity lifecycle and component storage.
Generic sparse set data structure for efficient entity-component storage.
Strongly-typed identifier for SpawnProfile instances.
Component for associating a renderable object with an entity.
